betrayal: They called her {label}. They forgot she was the only one who could save them.
Everyone she trusted betrayed her. Now they need her back.
revenge: They tried to bury her. She came back with a crown.
The empire destroyed her life. Now she is returning for the throne.
hidden_identity: No one knew who she really was until it was too late.
She hid her power to survive. Now the truth will break the kingdom.
romantic_tension: He was ordered to destroy her. He never expected to fall for her.
The one man she should hate became the only one who could protect her.
